EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} created a deployment token for the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
Failed to revoke a deployment token for the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} revoked a deployment token for the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
Failed to create a deployment token for the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
